items.description: Per-bucket share, sums to 100% within rounding
items.title: Items

total.description: Total asset value in base currency
total.title: Total

net_worth.description: Total assets minus total liabilities in base currency
net_worth.title: Net Worth

budget_year.description: Identifies the row along with category_code
budget_year.title: Budget Year

category_code.description: Identifies the row along with budget_year
category_code.title: Category Code

code_index.description: Dropdown order; auto-filled with max+1 when omitted
code_index.title: Code Index

code_type.description: Code category: Fixed / Floating / Invest / Income / Transfer / etc.
code_type.title: Code Type

parent_id.description: Parent code id; null for main codes
parent_id.title: Parent Id

credit_card_index.description: Sort order; auto-filled with max+1 when omitted
credit_card_index.title: Credit Card Index

period.description: YYYYMM for monthly or YYYY for yearly
period.title: Period

inner.description: Inner pie: amounts grouped by action_sub_type
inner.title: Inner

outer.description: Outer pie: amounts grouped by action_main_type
outer.title: Outer

amount.description: Summed absolute spending in base currency
amount.title: Amount

alive.description: True when the API process is responsive
alive.title: Alive

message.description: Human-readable confirmation that the import was scheduled
message.title: Message

period.description: Target period in YYYYMM. Empty string falls back to today.
period.title: Period

gain_loss.description: Net gain/loss for the month after FX conversion to base currency
gain_loss.title: Gain Loss

items.description: Journal entries for the month, ordered by spend_date
items.title: Items

amount.description: Aggregated charge amount for the month
amount.title: Amount

items.description: Per-card credit card liability for the month
items.title: Items

asset_index.description: Display order; server assigns max+1 if omitted
asset_index.title: Asset Index

options.description: Options that belong to this group
options.title: Options

account_rows.description: AccountBalance rows recomputed for the month
account_rows.title: Account Rows

credit_card_rows.description: CreditCardBalance rows recomputed for the month
credit_card_rows.title: Credit Card Rows

stock_rows.description: Stock snapshot rows inserted (skips zero-amount holdings)
stock_rows.title: Stock Rows

close_price.description: Close price (overwritten when trigger_yfinance is True)
close_price.title: Close Price

trigger_yfinance.description: When True, fetch close price from yfinance and overwrite close_price.
trigger_yfinance.title: Trigger Yfinance

is_done.description: Y/N; defaults to N when omitted
is_done.title: Is Done

target_year.description: YYYY; defaults to the current year when omitted
target_year.title: Target Year

period.description: YYYYMM for monthly, YYYY for yearly
period.title: Period

get.description: Return estate properties filtered by asset_id.

post.description: Create a new estate property; obtain_date accepts ISO 8601 and is stored as YYYYMMDD.

delete.description: Delete a single estate transaction row.

put.description: Update a single estate transaction row.

delete.description: Delete an estate property by id.

put.description: Update an estate property; any omitted field is left unchanged.

get.description: Return all fee/tax/rent/deposit transactions for an estate property.

post.description: Record a tax/fee/insurance/fix/rent/deposit transaction.

get.description: Return policies under a given asset_id.

post.description: Create a policy; start/end dates accept ISO 8601 and are stored as YYYYMMDD.

delete.description: Delete a single insurance transaction row.

put.description: Update a single insurance transaction row.
Update a policy by id; any omitted field is left unchanged.

get.description: Return all premium/claim/return transactions for a policy.

post.description: Record a pay/cash/return/expect transaction.

get.description: Return all loan liabilities ordered by loan_index.

post.description: Create a new loan liability; dates accept ISO 8601 and are stored as YYYYMMDD.

delete.description: Delete a single loan transaction row; Loan.repayed auto-recalculates.

put.description: Update a single loan transaction row; Loan.repayed auto-recalculates.

get.description: Return id/name pairs for loan selection UIs.
Return a single loan by id.

put.description: Update a loan; repayed is server-computed and cannot be set via this endpoint.

get.description: Return all repayment / interest / fee / increment transactions for a loan.

post.description: Record a principal/interest/increment/fee transaction. Server auto-recalculates Loan.repayed on principal rows.

get.description: Return all asset categories ordered by asset_index ascending (drives dropdown order).

post.description: Create a new asset category. If asset_index is omitted, the server assigns max(asset_index)+1.

get.description: Return the distinct asset_type values currently in use.

delete.description: Delete an asset category by id.

put.description: Update an asset category by id; any omitted field is left unchanged.

get.description: Return stock holdings filtered by asset_id.

post.description: Create a new stock holding under an asset category.

delete.description: Delete a single stock transaction row.

put.description: Update a single stock transaction row.

delete.description: Delete a stock holding by id.

put.description: Update a stock holding by id; any omitted field is left unchanged.

get.description: Return all buy/sell/stock-dividend/cash-dividend transactions for a holding.

post.description: Record a buy/sell/stock-dividend/cash-dividend transaction.

get.description: Returns alarms scheduled within today..today+6 months. Monthly-recurring alarms are expanded per month; expired months are excluded.
Returns per-category budget-vs-actual for a month (YYYYMM) or year (YYYY).

parameters.description: YYYYMM for monthly, YYYY for yearly
parameters.name: period

schema.description: YYYYMM for monthly, YYYY for yearly
schema.title: Period

get.description: Returns cross-owner Transfer totals grouped by sender (Account.owner). Rate is amount * 100 / 2,200,000 (legacy gift-tax threshold).
Returns spending / freedom_ratio / asset_debt_trend time series for the requested period (YYYYMM-YYYYMM).
Returns all target settings ordered by year desc.

post.description: Creates a target. target_year defaults to current year; is_done defaults to N.

put.description: Partial update. is_done can be changed independently.

get.description: Returns alive=true and the running app version. Does not depend on the database.

put.description: Snapshot every asset/liability net value for the vesting month. Idempotent: per-asset-type tables are delete+reinsert; AccountBalance and CreditCardBalance use cascade-delete from the target month forward to invalidate later carry-forward snapshots.

404.description: Vesting month has no eligible data

500.description: Settlement failed and was rolled back

post.description: Persist a new Journal row. distinct_number is auto-assigned.

delete.description: Delete a Journal identified by distinct_number.

put.description: Partial update of a Journal identified by distinct_number.

get.description: Return all Journal entries whose vesting_month matches the path parameter, ordered by spend_date. The response also includes the FX-converted gain/loss total for the month.

200.description: Journal list and gain/loss for the month

get.summary: List journals for a month with gain/loss

get.description: Compare expected (Budget.expected<MM>) vs actual (Journal.spending sum) per category, returning diff and usage_rate.
Return outer/inner aggregations of journal spending for the given month. Outer = grouped by action_main_type; inner = grouped by action_sub_type. Excludes 'invest' and 'transfer' main types.
Aggregate journal spending whose action_main_type == 'invest', grouped by action_sub_type.
Aggregate journal spending whose spend_way_type == 'credit_card', grouped by credit card.

post.description: Persist a new StockPriceHistory row. When trigger_yfinance is True the close price is overwritten by yfinance.
post.summary: Insert a stock price record (optionally fetch yfinance)

get.description: For every stock present in the holdings table, return the most recent StockPriceHistory close on or before month-end (falling back to the latest prior row when the month has none).
get.summary: Month-level closing prices for held stocks

get.description: Returns share (% + absolute) of each asset type, FX-converted to base currency.
Aggregates latest snapshots per asset/liability entity, FX-converts to base currency, returns net worth.
Returns monthly (12 points) or yearly (10 points) expenditure aggregated from Journal rows whose action_main_type is Floating or Fixed.
List accounts with optional filters on name, account_type, in_use.

post.description: Create an account. Rejects 422 when account_id is missing; 409 when account_id duplicates existing row.

get.description: Return in-use accounts ordered by account_index ASC for use in dropdowns.

delete.description: Delete an account by autoincrement id. Returns 404 if id not found.

put.description: Update an account by autoincrement id. Returns 404 if id not found.

get.description: List every alarm ordered by alarm_id ASC.

post.description: Create an alarm. due_date accepts multiple formats (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYYMMDD) and is persisted normalized as YYYYMMDD.

get.description: Return alarms whose alarm_date equals the query date (e.g. 08/26) or ends with it (e.g. monthly day 26 matches).

parameters.description: Date in MM/DD or DD form
parameters.name: date

schema.description: Date in MM/DD or DD form
schema.title: Date

delete.description: Delete an alarm by alarm_id. Returns 404 if not found.

put.description: Update an alarm by alarm_id. Returns 404 if not found. due_date is re-normalized when provided.
Update multiple Budget rows in one call. Each item is matched by (budget_year, category_code). Transactional — if any row is missing, all updates are rolled back.

404.description: One or more budget rows not found

get.description: Return distinct budget_year values present in Budget, ascending.
Return all Budget rows for the given year ordered by category_code.

post.description: Compute budget for {year} by averaging the previous year's Journal amounts per action_main_type across 12 months, then upsert into Budget.
post.summary: Copy budget from previous year journal

get.description: List all main (top-level) codes ordered by code_index.

post.description: Create a main code. If code_type is Fixed or Floating, a Budget row for the current year is auto-inserted with all monthly amounts set to 0.

get.description: Return all main codes with their sub-codes nested under sub_codes.

delete.description: Delete a main code by code_id. Returns 404 if not found.

put.description: Update a main code by code_id. Returns 404 if not found.

get.description: List sub-codes belonging to a main code, ordered by code_index.
List credit cards with optional filters on card_name (substring) and in_use. Ordered by credit_card_index ASC.

post.description: Create a credit card. When credit_card_index is omitted, auto-fill with max(credit_card_index)+1.

delete.description: Delete a credit card by credit_card_id. Returns 404 if not found.

put.description: Update a credit card by credit_card_id. Returns 404 if not found.

post.description: Create a sub-code. parent_id must reference an existing main code (404 otherwise).

delete.description: Delete a sub-code by code_id. Returns 404 if not found. No cascading.

put.description: Update a sub-code by code_id. Returns 404 if not found.

post.description: Kicks off a background task that pulls today's (or last-day-of-period) FX rates from Sinopac and upserts into FX_Rate.

202.description: Import scheduled as a background task.

post.summary: Fetch FX buy rates from Sinopac

post.description: Kicks off a background task that parses the configured pipe-delimited invoice CSV and inserts deduplicated journal rows.

202.description: Import scheduled as a background task.

post.description: Kicks off a background task that pulls daily OHLC for every distinct ticker in StockJournal and upserts into Stock_Price_History.

202.description: Import scheduled as a background task.

get.description: Return active accounts grouped by account_type, ordered by account_index ASC.

200.description: Grouped options for a frontend dropdown.

get.description: Return codes whose parent_id is NULL, grouped by code_type and ordered by code_index ASC.

200.description: Grouped options for a frontend dropdown.

get.summary: List top-level codes grouped by code_type

get.description: Return children of the parent code identified by code_group as a single 'sub' group.

200.description: Grouped options for a frontend dropdown.

get.summary: List sub-codes for a parent code

get.description: Return active credit cards in one group labelled 'Credit_Card'.

200.description: Grouped options for a frontend dropdown.

get.summary: List credit cards as a single group

get.description: Return open insurance policies (has_closed != 'Y') in one group labelled 'Insurance'.

200.description: Grouped options for a frontend dropdown.

get.summary: List insurance policies as a single group

get.description: Return loans in one group labelled 'Loan'.

200.description: Grouped options for a frontend dropdown.

get.summary: List loans as a single group
